description: Free. Dry-runs a metric request without payment and returns the exact x402 challenge the API issues (accepted networks, asset, amount, payTo). Invalid parameters fail here before any payment.

labels.name: get_metric
labels.description: Paid via x402 (up to $0.25 per request; exact price per metric in list_metrics). Fetches any GET metric by id with query parameters. Without payment this returns the x402 challenge in _meta["x402/error"]; x402-capable clients (e.g. withX402Client) sign it and retry with _meta["x402/payment"] automat

labels.name: compute_portfolio_var
labels.description: Paid via x402 ($0.05 per request). Computes empirical and/or normal parametric VaR for a crypto portfolio. Provide either weights + portfolioValueUsd, or quantities. Invalid portfolios fail before payment.

labels.name: compute_spread_greeks
labels.description: Paid via x402 ($0.05 per request). Nets Black-76 greeks across up to 6 Deribit BTC option legs and returns a spot×vol scenario P&L grid. Invalid legs or unknown instruments fail before payment.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_metrics, get_payment_requirements · Public sink: list_metrics.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_metrics, get_payment_requirements · Public sink: list_metrics

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
